task.title: Write validation gateway skill contract
task.summary: Define validation-mode instructions for independent fresh-context checks of builds, audits, content proof, and task close decisions.

goal.outcome: Validation mode gives agents a deterministic no-mutation gateway contract with exact refs, audits, and proof requirements.
acceptance: `codewiki-validation` skill frontmatter triggers on validating feedback/documentation/planning/implementation builds, task close, graph/drift audit, publication, or fresh validator handoff.

Instructions state exact inputs, tools (`codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, session handoff as needed), pass/fail/block semantics, required proof, task boundary gate, and no-mutation rule.
Output contract includes profile, build/source refs, audit refs, fresh_context/clean/content proof fields when required, and deterministic failed/blocking criteria.
non_goals: Do not perform compiler work or mutate canonical truth in validation mode.
Do not loosen existing validation policy.
verification: Inspect validation skill against validation-gateway spec.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-097 validation gateway skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-validation skill, exact no-mutation/audit/pass-fail-block/content-proof guidance, updated validation loop routing, and tests covering the new public gateway skill surface.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck

evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for validation skill existence, frontmatter, all compiler build triggers, `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, no compiler tools, fresh-context proof, `codewiki_session_handoff`, `codewiki_build` prohibition, block criteria, and stricter close/publication proof.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-validation` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback, documentation, planning, implementation, and validation skills.
Ran existing `tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs` as targeted validation policy coverage.
notes: Targeted validation/prompt/package tests were run before the broader smoke, pack, feature, and typecheck suite.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Created focused public validation gateway skill under `skills/codewiki-validation/`.
Added validation gateway tool reference under `skills/codewiki-validation/references/tools.md`.
Rewrote `skills/codewiki/loops/validation.md` to route to the dedicated validation skill and clarify no-mutation, audits, task-boundary, isolation/content proof, and output contract.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new validation gateway skill surface.
notes: No TypeScript runtime behavior changed; edits are skill/documentation/test contract changes.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for validation skill existence, frontmatter, all compiler build triggers, `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, no compiler tools, fresh-context proof, `codewiki_session_handoff`, `codewiki_build` prohibition, block criteria, and stricter close/publication proof.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-validation` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback, documentation, planning, implementation, and validation skills.
Ran existing `tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs` as targeted validation policy coverage.
code_change_evidence: Created focused public validation gateway skill under `skills/codewiki-validation/`.
Added validation gateway tool reference under `skills/codewiki-validation/references/tools.md`.
Rewrote `skills/codewiki/loops/validation.md` to route to the dedicated validation skill and clarify no-mutation, audits, task-boundary, isolation/content proof, and output contract.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new validation gateway skill surface.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `codewiki-validation` skill frontmatter triggers on validating feedback/documentation/planning/implementation builds, task close, graph/drift audit, publication, or fresh validator handoff.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Created `skills/codewiki-validation/SKILL.md` with `name: codewiki-validation` and a description covering feedback/documentation/planning/implementation builds, task close readiness, graph/drift audits, publication/readiness gates, and fresh validator handoffs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions state exact inputs, tools (`codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, session handoff as needed), pass/fail/block semantics, required proof, task boundary gate, and no-mutation rule.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `skills/codewiki-validation/SKILL.md`, `skills/codewiki-validation/references/tools.md`, and `skills/codewiki/loops/validation.md` define source inputs, `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, conditional `codewiki_session_handoff`, no compiler/task/source mutation, pass/fail/block meanings, task boundary checks, and fresh-context/content-proof gates.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Output contract includes profile, build/source refs, audit refs, fresh_context/clean/content proof fields when required, and deterministic failed/blocking criteria.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Validation skill and tool reference require profile, source/build refs, task id, audit refs/reports, checks, alignment status, failed criteria/blocking questions, isolation fields, `fresh_context`, `clean`, proof refs, and routing recommendation. Prompt asset tests assert these fields and forbidden tool use.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue improving CodeWiki skills by adding focused compiler/gateway loop skills with precise tool/build/gateway guidance; implement the validation gateway skill contract next.
implemented_changes: Added dedicated `codewiki-validation` public skill with independent no-mutation gateway workflow.
Added validation tool reference for `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, conditional session handoff, pass/fail/block criteria, task-boundary gates, and proof requirements.
Rewrote validation loop doc to route to the focused validation skill and spell out exact source refs, audit refs, isolation/content proof, and output fields.
Updated README and tests for the new public validation skill surface.
acceptance_evidence: Validation skill frontmatter and workflow exist.
Validation skill requires `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, no-mutation mode, pass/fail/block semantics, task-boundary checks, and required proof.
Validation tool reference forbids compiler/task/source mutations and defines deterministic block/pass/fail criteria.
Tests and package smoke pass with the new public validation skill.
checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck
non_goals_preserved: Did not perform compiler work or mutate canonical truth from validation mode guidance.
Did not loosen existing validation policy.
Did not change runtime TypeScript gateway behavior.
remaining_risks: Generated CodeWiki graph/task view files changed because roadmap/build state was updated.
Implementation build lacks source_planning_build due accepted feedback-to-task shortcut used before the new planning skill is validated.
TASK-093 through TASK-096 fresh validations remain pending.

risks: Implementation build does not cite a planning_build because TASK-097 implements the validation skill itself from accepted feedback before the focused planning loop is validated.
TASK-093 through TASK-096 remain pending fresh-context validation from staged handoffs.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-097 Write validation gateway skill contract implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-097 validation gateway skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-validation skill, exact no-mutation/audit/pass-fail-block/content-proof guidance, updated validation loop routing, and tests covering the new public gateway skill surface.

Checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck, skill markdown link check script, codewiki_audit profiles alignment,task,generated-parity for TASK-097
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
